home.text: Hello! I'm Samuel Nakazawa and this is my website :)

hero.span2: Accessibility, Projects, Platform Development and Web Optimization
hero.text1: passionate about creating accessible and performant digital experiences.
hero.text2: Currently developing and evolving platforms at
hero.text4: Outside of work, I enjoy cooking, building and assembling things, playing with friends and taking care of my 6 cats.

description: Globo is the largest media and television company in Latin America.

items: Developed AI assistants focused on improving publishing speed with quality and reliability, automating tasks such as spell-checking and article summary generation.
Led the delivery of real-time vote counting on G1, handling over 2.7 million simultaneous streaming channels while maintaining high availability and reliability.

items.text: Maintained, engineered, and provisioned systems for critical event coverage including:

description: CI&T is a global consultancy with clients including: Cielo, Google, HP, Itaú, Johnson & Johnson, Motorola, and Globo.

subitems: Created automated article registration script using Python
Content distribution system for Globo.com (Brazil's 3rd most-visited website) processing over a thousand articles daily, ensuring content to be viewed by millions of users every day.

items.text: Led database migrations for the following products using web scraping techniques:

description: Developed and maintained agendaOS web platform using React.js and Redux.
Contributed to the initial development of the mobile application with React Native.

item.institution: Faculdade de Tecnologia de Bragança Paulista
description: Focused on system development and information technology management.
